backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user profiles with access control plus DCF input validation and helper functions for valuation calculations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a specific UI change to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-written summaries of various frontend files describing styles, configuration, utilities, components, and DCF logic.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining light/dark OKLCH color tokens and global element style resets.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React app with metadata and favicon.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Node script verifying required generated image assets exist before building.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application assembling header, actions, form, validation, and results components for the DCF tool.
frontend/src/components/BuyTargetPriceCa: UI component rendering styled Buy and Target price cards with optional warning messaging.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Action bar providing buttons for example inputs, reset, shareable link copy, and optional dev check trigger.
frontend/src/components/CapitalReturnSec: Displays four formatted capital return metrics inside a styled card component.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form component for editing DCF input fields with validation and numeric parsing.
frontend/src/components/FormulasDialog.t: Dialog showing grouped DCF formula results using dynamically generated formula cards.
Manages draft and live site URLs with copy, validation, and open actions using local storage.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: Calculates intrinsic and actual values, animates results, and shows buy/target prices.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Implements DCF calculation helpers, exposing hidden values and intrinsic/actual price computations.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Runs verification checks on DCF formulas by comparing calculated values to expected results with tolerance and logs detailed pass/fail info.
frontend/src/features/dcf/formulas.ts: Defines and computes all DCF-related formulas using safe math helpers, producing a full registry of calculated financial metrics.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Provides the DcfInputs interface plus default, example, and verification input presets for DCF calculations.
frontend/src/features/dcf/sensitivity.ts: Empty placeholder file for future sensitivity analysis logic.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates DcfInputs fields for numeric ranges and formatting, returning structured validation errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, auto‑refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAllUserProfiles.ts: Empty placeholder file for fetching all user profiles.
Empty placeholder file for fetching the caller’s user profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Provides an animated count‑up hook that interpolates numbers over time with easing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context, handling login, logout, stored identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: Empty placeholder file for checking if the caller is an admin.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Creates a state hook synchronized with localStorage for persistent client-side values.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Maps frontend DCF inputs to backend format and queries backend DCF processing using react‑query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: React hook that syncs DCF calculator inputs with URL query params and generates shareable links.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Empty placeholder file for a future hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus custom OKLCH color variables, dark mode themes, and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/csv.ts: Empty placeholder module for CSV utilities.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions to format numbers, currency, percentages, and large values.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Helpers for parsing numeric and percentage inputs and converting decimals to percent strings.
frontend/src/lib/url.ts: URL utilities for validation, safe clipboard copying, and opening links with error handling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query, Internet Identity, and rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Functions for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and managing hash-based params.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, plugins, and dark mode settings.
project_state.json: Project state metadata including features, versions, and configuration flags.
